zh.lifeSummary: Phillipa Cockman是William Cockman的女兒，於1587年2月4日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾。她於1607年4月與Richard Baldwin在英國巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1641年7月在英國享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Phillipa Cockman是William Cockman的女儿，于1587年2月4日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾。她于1607年4月与Richard Baldwin在英国巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1641年7月在英国享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Cockman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name, from either Cocke + man ‘Cock's servant’, or else from Middle English cok(e) + man ‘cook's assistant or servant’.

variants.name: Cocke
meanings: nickname from Middle English cok (Old English and Old French coc) ‘rooster’.
patronymic from the Old French and Middle English personal name Cok, of uncertain origin but perhaps derived from the word in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Phillipa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Phyllis , derived from the genitive case (Greek Phyllidos, Latin Phyllidis) with the addition of the Latin feminine ending -a.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Phillipa Cockman was born on 4 February 1587, in Buckinghamshire, England as the daughter of William Cockman. She married Richard Baldwin in April 1607, in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in July 1641, in England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Phillipa Cockman est née le 4 février 1587, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de William Cockman. Elle a épousé Richard Baldwin en avril 1607, à Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en juillet 1641, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Phillipa Cockman wurde am 4. Februar 1587 in Buckinghamshire, England, als Tochter von William Cockman geboren. Sie hat im April 1607 in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England Richard Baldwin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb im Juli 1641 im Alter von 54 Jahren in England und wurde in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Phillipa Cockman è nata il il 4 febbraio 1587 nel Buckinghamshire, England come figlia di William Cockman. Lei sposato Richard Baldwin nel aprile 1607, nel Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1641, nel England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillipa Cockmanは1587年2月4日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでWilliam Cockmanの娘として生まれた。1607年4月にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンでRichard Baldwinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1641年7月にイギリスで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillipa Cockman(은)는 1587년 2월 4일 영국 벅잉함실르에서 William Cockman의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1607년 4월 영국 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴에서 Richard Baldwin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1641년 7월 영국에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Phillipa Cockman nasceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1587, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filha de William Cockman. Ela casou-se com Richard Baldwin em abril de 1607, em Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em julho de 1641, em Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Phillipa Cockman родилась 4 февраля 1587 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. Её отца звали William Cockman. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Baldwin апрель 1607 г. в местности астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла июль 1641 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
